facebook.content:
"But he gave them authority to trample on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy, and nothing will hurt them." - Luke 10:19

In a world where darkness and fear seek to dominate, Jesus empowers us with authority over their strongholds. As His kingdom ambassadors, we are called to boldly trample on the forces of evil, not with our own strength, but with the might of His Spirit.

instagram.content:
"All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. Go therefore and make disciples of all nations..." - Matthew 28:18

In an age where voices and authorities vie for our attention, let's remember that Jesus holds absolute authority over our lives. His dominion is not a distant memory, but a present reality. How does Jesus' authority shape your life decisions today?
